title: AUDIENCE-ASK 1 — what does anniversary mean?
prompt: @Papa center on the couch, right hand GENTLY RESTS on the cushion. Papa (warm): "It means we have been together for TEN years today." @Sara left side of couch, eyebrows LIFT, head TILTS. Sara: "What does anniversary MEAN?" @Eva right side of couch, looking up, tiny finger TAPS her chin. From the left, head turns slightly toward camera with a curious little smile. Sara (to camera): "Did YOU know what an anniversary is?"
